name: ccpraxis-local
description: Local ccpraxis plugin bundle. Plugins are loaded directly from the repo's plugins/ directory; no remote marketplace.

plugins.name: beacon
plugins.description: Mark Claude Code sessions as ongoing work; resume them later via claude-beacon.

plugins.name: backpack
plugins.description: What you pack to take into a /sandbox container. Declares tools, runtimes, and project-setup commands so they're auto-restored on every container rebuild.

plugins.name: sandbox
plugins.description: Prepare a project for running Claude Code in an isolated rootless-Podman dev container. Provides /sandbox:setup; the canonical entry point is the claude-sandbox launcher's auto-prompt.

plugins.name: steward
plugins.description: Meta-plugin that audits and maintains ccpraxis itself. Provides /steward:audit, which fans out read-only subagents and aggregates findings into a dated report.

plugins.name: blueprint
plugins.description: Authors durable blueprints (interrogate → decompose into scoped packages with a dependency DAG → fresh-context auditor gate). Host-usable. Provides /blueprint:create and /blueprint:manage; the blueprints it produces are executed by the sandbox-only butler plugin.

plugins.name: butler
plugins.description: Executes blueprints: detached headless coordinator sessions (one per package) driving scoped worker subagents, with hook-enforced discipline (ledger freshness, write-set containment, single-writer, git safety). Sandbox-only; pairs with the host-side blueprint plugin that authors blueprints.
